detail.description:
The rules are simple in this fun and relaxing color matching game, match at least four blocks of any color on the board to make them disappear but be careful! When there's no space left, it's game over!

Use your wits to play with strategy to make the most matches possible and set the highest scores you can!

eventMentions.text: interesting new kind of strategy game
so far i am enjoying this game the color match is a new one for me. and i love puzzles give it a try
feels unfinished . it's a complete working game .. just missing something i can't put my finger on .
